Title: Flowise: Parameter Override Bypass Remote Command Execution
Description: Flowise is vulnerable to a critical unauthenticated remote command execution (RCE) vulnerability. It can be exploited via a parameter override bypass using the `FILE-STORAGE::` keyword combined with a `NODE_OPTIONS` environment variable injection. This allows for the execution of arbitrary system commands with root privileges within the containerized Flowise instance, requiring only a single HTTP request and no authentication or knowledge of the instance.
